tools.name: claude_code
tools.description: Delegate a coding task to Claude Code, an AI-powered coding agent that can read, write, and edit files, run shell commands, and perform complex multi-step software engineering tasks autonomously.

prompt.description: The coding task or question for Claude Code to work on

working_dir.description: Working directory for Claude Code (defaults to session working directory)

resume.description: Claude Code session ID to resume a previous session

profile.description: Worker profile that scopes tool access. Defaults to general (backward compatible).
